news.title:

GMR Airports shares also surged over 5% after Q3 results.
news.summary:

news.title:

Optimism grows around potential benefits from the JB merger.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma shares attract attention after a stable Q3 performance.
Optimism grows around potential benefits from the JB merger.

news.title:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals sees sharp open interest surge, strong price rally.
Bullish investor sentiment grows in Pharma Biotech sector with volume growth.
news.summary:

news.title:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals Ltd (NSE:TORNTPHARM) is discussed for income investors before its ex-dividend date.
The article is provided by Simply Wall Street under Sanlam Private Wealth's financial services licence.
news.summary:

news.title:
Torrent Pharma shares audio recording of analyst call for Q3 and 9-month results ended Dec 2025.
Recording available on company's website under investor section for stakeholders' access.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma shares audio recording of analyst call for Q3 and 9-month results ended Dec 2025.
Recording available on company's website under investor section for stakeholders' access.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma Q3 net profit surged 26.3% to ₹635 Cr; revenue grew 17.6% to ₹3,303 Cr.
Announced ₹29/share interim dividend; shares closed at ₹4,074.05, down 0.18% on BSE.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma Q3 net profit surged 26.3% to ₹635 Cr; revenue grew 17.6% to ₹3,303 Cr.
Announced ₹29/share interim dividend; shares closed at ₹4,074.05, down 0.18% on BSE.

news.title:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals' board recommends Rs 29 interim dividend per share.
The dividend proposal is subject to shareholder approval.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals' board recommends Rs 29 interim dividend per share.
The dividend proposal is subject to shareholder approval.

news.title:
Indian bond issuances rise, with states raising ₹380B and corporates like Axis Bank, NHPC, and REC planning major fundraising.
Major corporates include JSW Steel (₹50B), Torrent Pharma (₹30B), and Prestige Estates (₹20B). Municipal issuances also active.
news.summary:
Indian bond issuances rise, with states raising ₹380B and corporates like Axis Bank, NHPC, and REC planning major fundraising.
Major corporates include JSW Steel (₹50B), Torrent Pharma (₹30B), and Prestige Estates (₹20B). Municipal issuances also active.

news.title:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals sets 19th Feb 2026 as record date for interim dividend eligibility.
Board meeting scheduled on 13th Feb 2026 to decide on interim dividend declaration.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals sets 19th Feb 2026 as record date for interim dividend eligibility.
Board meeting scheduled on 13th Feb 2026 to decide on interim dividend declaration.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma executed an NSE block trade of 61,261 shares at Rs. 4053.5.
The trade's total value amounted to Rs. 24.83 crores.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma executed an NSE block trade of 61,261 shares at Rs. 4053.5.
The trade's total value amounted to Rs. 24.83 crores.

news.title: Torrent Pharmaceuticals to discuss Q3 FY25 results and interim dividend in board meeting.
news.summary: Torrent Pharmaceuticals to discuss Q3 FY25 results and interim dividend in board meeting.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma merges with JB Chemicals, creating India's 5th largest pharma firm by market share and 2nd by market cap.
The merger enhances Torrent's chronic therapy portfolio, CDMO capabilities, and global footprint with synergies in products and operations.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma merges with JB Chemicals, creating India's 5th largest pharma firm by market share and 2nd by market cap.
The merger enhances Torrent's chronic therapy portfolio, CDMO capabilities, and global footprint with synergies in products and operations.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma appoints Geena Malhotra as CTO effective 1 Feb 2026.
Malhotra, ex-Cipla CTO, brings 40 years of pharma R&D and leadership expertise.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma appoints Geena Malhotra as CTO effective 1 Feb 2026.
Malhotra, ex-Cipla CTO, brings 40 years of pharma R&D and leadership expertise.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma's Dahej facility cleared by FDA; it raises JB Chemicals stake to 48.75%.
Q2FY26 profit rises 30.4% YoY to ₹591 crore; India biz grows 12% with strong chronic portfolio.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma's Dahej facility cleared by FDA; it raises JB Chemicals stake to 48.75%.
Q2FY26 profit rises 30.4% YoY to ₹591 crore; India biz grows 12% with strong chronic portfolio.

news.title:
USFDA inspected Torrent Pharma's Dahej facility from Jan 19-23, 2026.
Inspection concluded with zero observations, indicating compliance with US standards.
news.summary:
USFDA inspected Torrent Pharma's Dahej facility from Jan 19-23, 2026.
Inspection concluded with zero observations, indicating compliance with US standards.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma acquired 7.44 crore shares of JB Chemicals, totaling 46.4%.
Acquisition completed on Jan 21, 2026; now classified as promoter.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma acquired 7.44 crore shares of JB Chemicals, totaling 46.4%.
Acquisition completed on Jan 21, 2026; now classified as promoter.

news.title:
JB Chemicals announces Torrent Pharma as the new promoter of the company.
CEO Nikhil Chopra resigns from JB Chemicals and Pharmaceuticals.
news.summary:
JB Chemicals announces Torrent Pharma as the new promoter of the company.
CEO Nikhil Chopra resigns from JB Chemicals and Pharmaceuticals.

news.title:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals approves allotment of 10.99 crore NCDs in 4 series.
Total value INR 1,09,900 crore; tenures 2-4.9 years; coupon rates 7.45%-7.8% p.a.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals approves allotment of 10.99 crore NCDs in 4 series.
Total value INR 1,09,900 crore; tenures 2-4.9 years; coupon rates 7.45%-7.8% p.a.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma issued commercial papers worth ₹1,500 crore, each valued at ₹5 lakh.
The unsecured CPs have a 337-day tenure, 7.2% interest rate, and are NSE-listed.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma issued commercial papers worth ₹1,500 crore, each valued at ₹5 lakh.
The unsecured CPs have a 337-day tenure, 7.2% interest rate, and are NSE-listed.

news.title:
Indian bond prices dip as 10-year US Treasury yields rise; lower state bond supply eases pressure.
Torrent Pharma raised ₹110B via bonds; Axis Bank issued ₹1.5B perpetual bonds; more issuances expected.
news.summary:
Indian bond prices dip as 10-year US Treasury yields rise; lower state bond supply eases pressure.
Torrent Pharma raised ₹110B via bonds; Axis Bank issued ₹1.5B perpetual bonds; more issuances expected.
